svg.aria-label: Pipeline: an approved still becomes a moving shot
svg.text: THE PRODUCTION STILL — BECOMES FRAME ONE
LLMS NODE · QWEN3-30B VIA API ROUTER
in: what moves, one camera move max
out: the ride arms turn slowly,
MOVEMENT ONLY — THE STILL OWNS THE LOOK
RENDER NODE · STILL LOCKED AS FRAME ONE · 12GB VIA RAM OFFLOAD
the world of the still survives the whole clip — no drift, no melt
